rulings.Case Title: GOLDEN REALTY, LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY et al VS. WASHINGTON MUTUAL BANK et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Monday Oct. 1, 2012. Line 1 - DEFENDANT JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A.'s DEMURRER TO 3RD AMENDED COMPLAINT. Sustain with final leave to amend to allege facts to establish existence of contract and particularity re fraud. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CHING CHAU CHAN VS. ERLINDA HERBERT et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Monday Oct. 1, 2012. Line 2 - DEFENDANT ERLINDA HERBERT's DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Hearing require to address combining other causes of action with CCP 1161a against same party. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: THE SOCIETY OF RUSSIAN CADETS AND VETERANS OF WW 1 VS. VICTOR RUBEL et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Monday Oct. 1, 2012. Line 5 - PLAINTIFF THE SOCIETY OF RUSSIAN CADETS AND VETERANS OF WW 1's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Grant subject to opposition. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: PERRY RHODES III VS. CARMELITA GONZALES
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Monday Oct. 1, 2012. Line 3 - DEFENDANT CARMELITA GONZALES' MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Off calendar, settled on September 27, 2012. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JOSEPH ANGELESCO VS. JOE WATKINS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Mtn To Quash Service Of Summons
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Monday Oct. 1, 2012. Line 4 - DEFENDANT JOSEPH WATKINS' Motion To Quash Service Of Summons. Sustain with leave to amend to allege in good faith service of 3 day notice at 510 Divisadero Street #34. =(501/REQ)
